message:
feat: expand blocking/IO driver APIs, network subsystem, and runtime tests

- blocking.h/c: extend blocking pool API with configurable thread limits
- io_driver.h/c: add IO driver event subscription and poll configuration
- net.h/c: expand network socket operations
- Extend unit tests for blocking, IO driver, and runtime (+448 lines)
- Refine network E2E and vignette test scenarios
- Update Makefile and header declarations, sync beads tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
